title: Tugboat Overnight Experience - Northwest Seaport Maritime Heritage Center
content: Plan on bringing meals or eating out, an extra blanket, and other overnight necessities. Spending the night aboard Arthur Foss is a great way to learn about a classic American story, the neighboring historic vessels, Lake Union’s cool environment, and modern Seattle…all just over her gunwale.

title: Hotels near Arthur Foss, Seattle (WA) - BEST HOTEL RATES Near , Seattle (WA) - United States
content: One of the top reasons to visit ... operations, making it an educational experience for visitors of all ages . Another compelling reason to experience Arthur Foss is the breathtaking views of Seattle's waterfront.

title: ARTHUR'S, Seattle - West Seattle - Restaurant Reviews & Phone Number - Tripadvisor
content: My sister and I went here for dinner, because we live in West Seattle, and are always looking for a new spot to eat. We were there at Happy Hour, and the mixed drinks were great. We ordered off the smaller plates menu, so we did not expect piles and piles of food. I had something with brussel sprouts and bacon. It was delicious. I have never even desired to TRY a brussel sprout, but my sister urged me on, and I was very pleased. The flavors blended seamlessly, and I had a true culinary experience.

title: Meet the Seattle tugboat that made history across three centuries: the Arthur Foss | The Seattle Times
content: April 11, 2018 - Last summer I had the opportunity to get an up-close look at the historic Arthur Foss tugboat while it was undergoing restoration in dry dock.
